title: lyonia marginata
intro: Lyonia marginata, also known as the Staggerbush, is a deciduous shrub native to eastern North America. It has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Lyonia marginata include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain and inflammation, and support the immune system. Lyonia marginata is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and has also been used in traditional folk medicine for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties.
